entities.name: PLANT GENETIC MODELS
entities.description: The use of specific plant species as models to study biological processes for application in crop improvement

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural productivity and output of a crop

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup and performance of crops

entities.name: GENOMES
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material present in an organism

entities.name: MOLECULAR BIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of biological activity at the molecular level, providing tools for crop enhancement

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS THALIANA
entities.description: A small flowering plant used as a primary model organism in plant biology

entities.name: LOTUS JAPONICUS
entities.description: A legume species used as a model plant for studying legume genetics

entities.name: MEDICAGO
entities.description: A genus of legumes used as a model plant system

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A globally important food plant used for application of model plant research

entities.name: CANOLA
entities.description: A globally important oilseed crop used for application of model plant research

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: A group of globally important food plants used for application of model plant research

entities.name: BRACHYPODIUM DISTACHYON
entities.description: A grass species serving as an attractive new model plant system with specific evolutionary and genomic attributes

entities.name: POST-GENOMIC ERA
entities.description: The period of biological research following the sequencing of genomes, focusing on functional genomics
